## 1. New LLM Versions / Major AI Lab Tools
- Date: 2026-04-07
  Link: https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/health/mental-health-updates/
  Summary: Google said Gemini will more directly route users seeking mental-health support toward authoritative information and human help, alongside broader mental-health support initiatives.
  Why it matters: This is a product/safety adjustment from a major AI platform that changes how a frontier assistant handles a high-risk use case.

## 4. Major AI Data Center News
- Date: 2026-04-06
  Link: https://www.anthropic.com/news/google-broadcom-partnership-compute
  Summary: Anthropic signed a new agreement with Google and Broadcom for multiple gigawatts of next-generation TPU capacity, with deployment expected to begin in 2027.
  Why it matters: This is a material compute-supply expansion for a frontier lab and a direct indicator that hyperscaler-scale AI infrastructure buildout is continuing.
